sourceRefs.summary: SETD1B broad H3K4me3 claim graph locator.
Official GEO Series page for GSE242515.
Raw BED domain pilot stats, checksums, parameters, and comparison output.

rationale: The approved raw BED domain pilot downloaded configured public interval files (RS4_WT, RS4_Setd1bKO) and independently applied the configured merge and width rule. RS4 Setd1bKO has far fewer selected >5 kb H3K4me3 merged domains than RS4 WT under the configured merge/width rule. This supports the bounded claim slice without upgrading the whole paper claim to reproduced.

supportingEvidenceRefs.summary: Computed input interval, merged domain, and selected-domain counts.
Raw BED domain pilot figure reproduction report.
Readiness dossier with approval, budget, checksum, and environment checks.

missingEvidence.summary: Full reproduction still requires FASTQ/BAM-level alignment, peak calling, replicate handling, and broad-domain calling across all relevant stages and controls.
